description: You are an intelligence analyst working on a secure corporate workstation. IT has just rolled out a new network policy that blocks direct outbound Tor connections. Read the network briefing document at /home/ga/Documents/Network_Briefing.md to extract the required proxy configuration details (Proxy Type, IP Address, and Port). Configure Tor Browser to route through the specified proxy and save a backup copy of the updated torrc configuration file to /home/ga/Documents/torrc_backup.txt.
